What I really like about these is the waffle knit material. It just gives the pants something different, other than a straight work slack. I’m 5’9” and around 150 lbs and ordered a medium. Takes awhile to arrive. They fit GReAT and lay very nice. Washed in cold water and dried slightly. The hem at the bottom got weird and I had to iron them flat. I’m a size 14 + and 5’6”, and the XXL fit like a dream. No tight or bunched up areas. This really fits my smaller waist well. I had about 3 inches “extra” all around. I’m ordering 2 more colors in XL. Just hope they fit just as well.

As comfy as leggings, but thicker & dressier (and no cameltoe) As w/ seemingly many others, I bought my first pairs @ CVS (got 3). I don’t normally shop for clothes there, but they were a serendipitous discovery, and having a hard-to-fit body where I don’t often find items that I can wear off-the-rack (I’m an endomorph, or “apple” type, where my waist is short & thick), I wanted to look for more pairs, solids specifically (black, heather grey & indigo w/ gold threading), to have as wardrobe basics. I was THRILLED to find them on Amazon (and they do have their own website, as well), and bought the pairs that I was looking for, after reading reviews from customers who ended up becoming Lildy fans in the same manner. These jeggings are SO comfy that you can literally wear them 24/7, and even for activities that require a broad range of movement (splits, high kicks). I wear them to sleep, because I’m at that stage in my life where I’m too lazy to change in & out of clothes constantly (just turned 47). I have a “uniform” that works for me (wifebeater & jeggings), and it’s nice to be able to simply add accessories, outerwear & shoes, and voila….I’m dressed to go outside. 👌 Prior to finding the Lildy jeggings @ CVS, I was wearing leggings, but would wear a mini over them solely for the coverage to hide the cameltoe. Now, I don’t have to do that because the material for the jeggings is thicker. I save myself from needing to put on an extra garment that constantly shifts from movement, and requires additional labor to adjust & launder. Dressing is much easier, and I effortlessly look pulled together. I always wore bootcut or flared pants (they were more flattering for my silhouette), but these jeggings fit so well that I feel confident about how I look in them (can’t say the same for the ones from Walmart), and unlike w/ flared or bootcut bottoms, these tuck into knee-hi boots w/o any of that extra fabric, and make looking cute such a non-job. Highly recommended, if you feel that the cut will work for your body shape. Great value for the price—you’ll get hooked & end up coming back for more colors & patterns. (For reference, I’m just under 5’2”, ~110 lbs., 28” waist & 28” inseam.) UPDATE: (May 2022) I’m now on my SEVENTH pair of Lildy jeggings! 👖 Just got the olive green solid color. Made just like the rest. I LIVE in these—you can exercise & sleep in these jeggings, and it’s nice that they look like “real pants.” 😆 The grey ones look fairly refined, almost like twill pants, and you just pull’em up like they’re you’re favorite pair of leggings, but might be fine for a “casual nice” work dress code. 🥰

Good quality, not high waisted These are completely opaque, heavier fabric, which I like. The denim is very dark in a good way. I am 5'7", 160 lb and order the L/XL. I was a little disappointed that they were a little more low-rise than they seem to be in the online picture.
Large too big for 165 muscular build Lots of wrinkles behind the knee and around the waistline. I'm 165lbs muscular build and large is too big.

Good Quality Jeggings These denim jeggings feel like they’re made well. The fabric is thick, but still very stretchy and easy to move in. I’m 5’8”, 150lbs, and pear-shaped with a 31.5” waist and 44” hips. The “L-XL” size fits my legs, thighs, and butt perfectly. The waist comes up a bit higher on my torso than I expected and feels a little loose, but I could imagine that if it were tighter, it might create muffin top, which I don’t want. I’m very happy with my purchase and would recommend these jeggings!

Nice design, Wish size X-Small was offered Generous cut. She’ll need to grow into these. I ordered in size small but she’s at that in-between stage of moving from teen clothing to women's. She wears a size women's small in Old Navy brands, but these were not flattering on her 5’ 3” (and growing!), 115# frame. They hung on her. I realize they should drape, but the pleating at the waist, and the length in the leg, gave a look like she was dressing in her mother’s slacks. Worn with a high heel (she doesn’t), and given a press, these would be much better. But out of the package, see photos. Here’s what she liked… She said they were comfortable and airy, but not so airy that you don’t get the coverage you need. She liked that the crotch was not skin tight but thought it could have been a little more fitted because the way it fit on her, it would be creased 24-7. She did like that the waist was fitted but not super tight. And, she liked the style details - flared bottoms, paper bag waist, the button closure, pleats and side pockets. She thought the slacks would make a design statement when you don’t want to wear a dress, and she liked that the bow belt was removable, depending on the occasion. The way she’s growing, it won’t be long before these will fit and drape nicely. Currently, her waist is 29.5”, hip 37”, inseam 28-29” and she is wearing the size small in the photo.

Def recommend this for Amazon clothes I’ll give the essential info..... • I’m 4’11” and 124lbs • 29”/30” waist, 39” hips with a pretty flat tummy • I purchased a small based off of what other women were saying their measurements were and what size they bought • Def wash these inside out PROS: • It fit nice and snug but not extremely tight that my thighs looked like sausages busting out • the waist is really snug. If my tummy wasn’t more on the flat side I’d probably have to get a medium so I wouldn’t get a high muffin top. • the material is super smooth, love the feel! • I bought 4 different colors and they all look amazing. • The lines/patterns do well to shape you rump • Decent price and quality of product. Especially for amazon clothes. I feel like they never are what you think they are • Colors are shuttle and not as vibrant as they are online but that’s okay. I really like them • Great side pockets for putting your phone or whatever. • Small pocket to put a credit card or a key. CONS: • the material is super smooth, However, I feel as if it could develop those little balls on it after a bunch of washes but we will see. I’ll wash it inside out • I know I’m short but these are super long. I’m going to have to roll these suckers even though I hate doing that.

See through, not for hard workouts Soft like one of those really soft pj shirts. Light and silky. These are not compression. My waist to hip ratio is nothing dramatic but the waistband was not strong enough to keep these up more than 1/4 through my HITT leg day work out. The pockets are not strong enough to hold in my iphone 8 plus. I would not put my phone in them or really anything. The seam under the waist across the butt is annoying and honestly creates an uncomfortable bulging that had me constantly trying to hike them up. If youre looking for something to lounge in, 100% buy these. If youre looking to buts out a hard work out, i wouldnt. They are absolutely see through. I will not post a photo of my butt proving so. But i can see my knees through them. The ankles are loose and though this isnt a big deal, it bothers me. They look nice enough. But i wont be buting more. If youre looking for the impressive VS workout leggings dont buy these but possibly something a little pricier or even high waisted fablitics leggings. Yeah. I prefer being trapped into the scheme that is Fabletics to get averagely priced leggings that keep me feeling confidant over these. Im 5’8” 140lbs and these are a small. If they were thicker i could probably fit great into an XS

Short curvy girl approved I am 5’2”, 142 pounds and very pear shaped. I ordered a medium. Length is perfect! I didn’t want cropped pants, so these are the perfect petite length. I was worried about these fitting weird around my waist- I deal with IBS bloat and am horribly self conscious about waist lines. The fit is comfy given my large hips, thick thighs, and will be comfy and flattering around my IBS flare ups. Fabric is actually flattering! I tested a bunch of linen pants at various shops recently and didn’t like the thin, see through linen (again, sensitive about my big hips.). These are a little thicker, and while the fabric is a little rougher (I suspect they’ll soften in the wash with some fabric softener), they’ll wear much better. And, the pricing here really can’t be beat for the quality. I ordered the striped navy blue. Navy is super dark (my lighting in pics is bad, sorry!), so the pinstripes pop nicely. I’m considering ordering another pair before my upcoming trip! These will travel so well, I can already tell. In a nutshell- yes, buy them.

Waist is tight, they run small and short, they shrink! I'm very disappointed in these pants, as they are a cute design and looked like they'd be comfortable. But I can't really wear them after washing them. For reference, I am 5'7" and 133#. I ordered size Small. My photos were taken BEFORE I washed them... 1) There are many loose threads hanging off these pants, due to low quality control. 2) The elastic waist is very tight. Too tight for a supposedly comfy pajama/lounge pant, especially one worn mid-rise. I think buyers should size-UP. 3) These pants are 100% Cotton, and definitely shrank after the first wash in cold water and tumble dry on Low heat. Now they feel even smaller and are too short for me. In general, I recommend that buyers SIZE-UP by 1-2 sizes, and either hang dry or dry on low heat for very short time. Too bad the quality is low, because the navy/white gingham design and "boxer" look is cute.

Super high waist but very little shape I’m 5’6”, 129 lbs., and wearing the medium (8-10) in my photo. I’m normally a consistent size 4 in US pants/jeans but I’ve learned to order up from Amazon. I’m happy with the fit of the medium. The fabric is lightweight and feels like a thick chiffon. The pants have a button/zipper fly and deep hip pockets but the back pockets are fake. There are belt loops on the waistband but the back is elastic so the belt is optional. The color is a deep navy. The legs are long enough that I have to wear at least a short heel to keep them from dragging the ground. What I like: 1. The super high waist and wide leg style. 2. Lightweight and flowy, good for summer work pants. 3. Real (and deep) pockets. What I don’t like: 1. The material has a nylon pantyhose feel, just scratchy enough to be noticeable. 2. Profile of the pants is kind of shapeless. The fabric just hangs and does very little to flatter the figure.

obsessed but size down!! my amazon recommended size was a M, but after reading reviews and seeing how stretchy they were i sized down to a S. honestly could have done an XS but super happy with them!! for reference im 5’5 and approx 135 lbs

Light weight stylish comfort These jeans are amazing! Light weight denim, nice blue color options, stretchy but hold their shape, nice wide leg. As a shortie (5ft) these are a fuller length denim on me, to my ankle and look great. I’m a size 6 and ordered the medium and they are so comfortable. Full travel days and nothing digging in and suffocating. These and the Anthro Colette jeans arrived on the same day I kept these instead, much lighter weight, more stretch, better denim color, and a fraction of the price. I now own 3 pairs!

They’re super cute, run big So I am 5’2” and with the full length of the cropped jean, it was a little long. I used temporary stitches to fold over since I didn’t want to lose the larger hem style by taking them to the tailor. Fit perfectly first thing in the morning but by days end they became a little baggy. For reference I’m about 120 lbs and I ordered a small.

💗💗💗 These pants are too adorable! They are very comfortable with just enough stretch. I’m 5’6”, weigh 140lbs and I ordered a medium. They fit perfect. It was worth the weight to get them. The delivery took a couple of weeks. So if you’re wanting them for an event, don’t wait yo order!
So comfortable! So happy with these! I am 5’10” and usually a size 10; I ordered the Large. They fit great! Love the high waist. They are cotton (not jean material) so very light and comfortable!

Great for short girls I’m 4’ 11” and these fit perfect in the length. They are a nice soft denim with a good amount of stretch, but didn’t stretch out after wearing all day. Ordering more in different colors

Great for short girls I’m 4’ 11” and these fit perfect in the length. They are a nice soft denim with a good amount of stretch, but didn’t stretch out after wearing all day. Ordering more in different colors

Runs big These jeans are so cute! Initially when I ordered, I went with amazons suggestion (which is usually pretty spot on), and ordered a medium. They were huge, but I loved them so I reordered in a small. Honestly, after getting them and wearing them, I could have done an extra small. They are a mid-rise fit, super stretchy, and comfortable (like no joke ladies if you’re still dropping it like it’s hot, these are for you). They are the perfect cropped length (I am 5’7), the white is not see through (I’m wearing magenta underwear in the pics), and I am seriously obsessed with the flared bottom detail. I was really hoping to just pop these in the dryer for some shrink action, but the label specifically says no dryer so I’m rolling with the looser fit. These definitely look more high end than they are, and I’m probably going to order the Jean version because I like them so much. I definitely recommend, but would suggest sizing down. For reference I am pretty universally a size 3 or small in most pants.

Tall girls wanted Here I go again, ordering pants I know will not suit a vertically-challenged chick as myself (5’1”). Sometimes it works out considering how you wear it, yes? These jeans, size small in medium blue, were not the case. I had to wear them below my waist/belly button. Otherwise, they would be too loose, requiring a belt.There is some stretch to these pants so I could pull them on and off without unbuttoning. Not that it matters anyway since there is extra fabric everywhere. I think if the hemline didn’t flare, these jeans would have been ok on me. They remind me of another pair I ordered here on the Amazon. But those worked better being wide-legged.I’ll keep these for now and hope I grow five inches overnight. The denim is medium weight. The quality is comparable to Gap. In the meantime, I’ll pair them with anything but flats or flip flops. Fake it til you make it as the fashion world says it.

Fit well and comfortable The picture shows one of many ways I plan on wearing these comfy pants. They have just the right amount of stretch. I washed mine on cold/delicates and hung them dry. They came out perfectly, with no dye run or fading. I'm 5 foot two inches and these pants come to the top of my foot.

Stretchy and Comfy I bought these to wear for work. I was touring a new cruise ship and needed something stylish but easy to move around in. These hit the spot. I do agree with others that the waistline is tapered but, for me, they worked ok. I have an hourglass figure so my body tapers at the waist naturally. If you have an apple shape, you will need to size up. I’m 5’4”, 160 pounds and the medium fit well. If I weighed a smidge over 160, they wouldn’t work. The fabric is soft and wasn’t see through with my skin tone underwear. The pockets sit high on the front and while functional, are a little awkwardly placed for truly holding items. There are pockets on the back that work great for normal use. This will be a staple in my wardrobe. I really enjoyed wearing them.

cute and trendy These jeans look so fresh and trendy! The color is also exactly what I expected. The cut and length definitely make them a fashion staple and they are good for all sorts of events. I'm 5'6 and 140 lbs and I ordered a Small and they fit me just fine. They're super stretchy and totally comfortable when I sit down or squat. They came in a tightly vacuumed bag so it's probably better to iron them first before putting on. I'm totally happy with these cute jeans!

Love love love These jeans are perfecttttt. At my height, it's a perfect crop, not too short. The stretch is good. Obvs you need to wear your skin tone underwear, but you should know that. I used a steamer for the wrinkles, that took a while but I don't have a washer/dryer at home. Haven't washed it yet but I always wash on cold and hang dry most of my stuff. For reference, I got size Large based on the size chart, and it fits well. I'm 5'8", 173lb, 38b, mid waist is 34", hips are 40". I'm usually a size 10.
Comfortable Very nice fit, a bit long for a 5’2” person, wore heels so it was fine. Covered large stomach… weight is 148lbs. Pleased with purchase. Soft and lightweight.
Comfortable Very nice fit, a bit long for a 5’2” person, wore heels so it was fine. Covered large stomach… weight is 148lbs. Pleased with purchase. Soft and lightweight.

Stretchy & comfortable. I really like this pant. I bought to grow into during pregnancy. Fits high, which I like. A bit thin up top but nothing I can’t deal with. Very flowy and soft. The pants are long on me. But I’m short, 5’4. But with platform shoes it’s perfect height. Love love love.

I absolutely loved it. I am 5'4.5, I weigh 137lbs. I ordered a size med pants. The length is perfect for me, I wore a 2" heel. If you are above 5'7" it can still work for you. It will depend on your preference. Your accessories and personality can make it happen. My sister and I am at a women's tea gathering. I am showing worn with a 2" heel. s/n: I ordered the blouse size XL

LOVE THEM! The only complaint I have is that the colors are not true to the photos in website. The lilac is a shade lighter and the purple one’s look more on the “wine” side. But I still want kne in basically every color anyway.They are so comfortable and not see-through like some say on the reviews, although I wear longer blouses to cover my hips. I am 5’1 and they go to the middle of my calf which is a perfect length to hide my leg flaws. I gave 4 stars because the colors are not true to,what’s shown, especially the lighter colors.

These are so comfortable! I am 5' 6" and 190-200 pounds. I ordered the XL size. So, I just rec'd these and immediately tried them on. I haven't worn them out of the house yet. I just love the swish on the legs; last time I had culottes I was like 7 or 8 years old and they were so cool; I loved them. I feel the same way about these! They're certainly longer than is shown on the model, they hit at my calf in front and actually hang longer in the back of the leg; interesting. These are such a lovely soft material; it feels like you're not wearing anything, or like pajamas. I had a pair of black undies on, and it was kind of dark in the house, so I can't speak to if they're see-through or not. I sure hope not! I had my husband take pics for me and I hope they're . I can't wait to wear these outside and just enjoy them! I would recommend them. If I wanted them to be skin-tight I would have gotten a large, but I think the XL is perfect for my hips and butt. The lines on my butt pic I guess are from the flash on the camera; they didn't have any stains or anything. I just love these and want to get more colors!

Cute. Comfortable. Updates Yoga/Sweatpants Very comfortable. Fit is great. I'm 5'1" and they're definitely full length pants. The model makes it look like they're just below the knee, but they're definitely just below the ankle. Other than that they're great. More updated yoga/sweatpants.

Does not run large If your pear shaped like me, ignore the "runs large" comments lol I'm 5'5 180# I wear between size 10-12 jeans and a large in leggings and it is very snug in the thigh and butt region

Tall size great for tall people! I’m 6 ft tall (more legs than torso) and size 10-12, I usually buy 34” inseam pants, currently 21 weeks pregnant. I bought size L extra long and I’m glad to that these leggings are long enough for me 😊. My belly isn’t huge yet and these leggings don’t keep falling off like another pair of maternity leggings I got, and the belly panel seems like it will stretch enough to fit comfortably for the rest of the pregnancy. The fabric is soft and comfy and has the perfect thickness.
Super comfortable! I really love these, they are super comfortable and stretchy. I’m 5’1 and weigh 167 pounds and got a large and 28 inseam. I was 26ish weeks in these pictures.

Surprisingly nice When these arrived, they looked liked they'd run small or be too thin of fabric since they are really light. I waited a while to try them on because I didn't anticipate being able to wear them out of the house. Happily, they fit really well and don't show through! I'm 5'9" and inseams often run short for me, but these were just fine. Both standing and bending over did not show the print of the underwear I had on under these, as you can see in the pics. They are really smooth, so if you wear them with a sweater or other cotton top, they won't cling. I wish they had pockets, but for the number of maternity pants I am finding that are transparent, I can live without that as long as they cover my butt! Adequately stretchy and comfortable, even over the baby bump! Very happy!

Too short The material of these pants reminds me a little of a dance costume - it’s much more silky and slinky than I prefer but they aren’t see through and have not pilled at all yet. I would also like them to be about 2” longer on me at just over 5’7”. The waist is pretty comfortable but there is a ~1” thick elastic that runs around the top of the pant that goes over your belly. Because it doesn’t lay directly on my belly it’s ok but I definitely prefer and recommend a soft folded waistband, especially for mamas with a super sensitive belly like me.

Comfy lounge pants These are decent capri pants but, for me, they feel more like pajama bottoms or lounging wear. They are thin -- not see-through thin -- but lightweight pants. I have a size 30 waist, am 5'8" and weigh about 155, give or take a few pounds. These fit very well but I think I could have actually sized down for a more trim fit.The cut of the pants are different from other workout capris I own. There a lot of stretch and a baggier fit to the legs. I'm used to workout capris that fit snug to the body. These are much more looser in fit. I think I might have been happier with a size medium as there is plenty of room in the stomach area. If you carry a bit of weight, these will not disappoint. The material is very stretchy and soft.

Size up! I am a very typical size small top and bottom. I’m 5’5, 135 lbs. I do have slightly muscular legs but nothing crazy. These pants fit more like leggings than sweats. The material was flow and butter soft. They remind me of the Gymshark Training Performance joggers. I liked the waist fit, it was secure and not loose so I wouldn’t have to tie them, but they were so tight around the legs you could see the pockets which is not at all what I was going for. I will try for a size medium and hope the waist band isn’t too loose. They also were just barely long enough.
